01001.name: Roland Banks

1.notes: After defeating an enemy, discover a clue at your location (combat->clue payoff).

01001.notes: The Fed. Guardian/Seeker hybrid; 4 combat / 3 intellect mirror his deck focus.

01002.name: Daisy Walker

1.notes: Bonus action usable only for Tome abilities; elder sign draws 1 card per Tome asset you control (clue + card-draw engine).

01002.notes: The clue queen; intellect 5 plus a bonus Tome action and a card-draw elder sign make her the core investigate/support seeker.

01003.name: "Skids" O'Toole

1.notes: Fast: spend 2 resources to gain 1 additional action this turn (action economy / flexible tempo).

01003.notes: Flexible rogue; agility 4 evader who buys extra actions out of his deep resource pool.

01004.name: Agnes Baker

1.notes: Free reaction after horror is placed on you: deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location (horror-fueled damage).

01004.notes: Core damage mystic; willpower 5 fuels Shrivelling and her horror-for-damage reaction makes her primary focus combat.

01005.name: Wendy Adams

1.notes: Triggered after revealing a chaos token: discard 1 card to cancel it and reveal another (chaos-bag control).

01005.notes: Survivor chaos-bag controller; discards cards to re-roll bad tokens, leaning on willpower/agility to survive and evade.

1.notes: Fight for +1 damage; +3 combat (instead of +1) while you are at a location with clues. Spends 1 ammo.

01006.notes: Roland's signature firearm; scales with clues at your location, rewarding the combat->clue loop.

1.notes: Fight with +1 combat; deals +1 damage when the targeted enemy is the only one engaged with you.
Fight with +1 combat and +1 damage. Spends 1 ammo.
Fight with +1 combat for this attack.

2.notes: Discard Knife: Fight with +2 combat and +1 damage for this attack.

01025.notes: Commit to a Fight test; deals +1 damage on success.

01091.notes: Two combat icons; draw a card when the test succeeds.

1000.notes: Played as an action: deal 3 damage to each enemy and investigator at a location you are at or connected to (AoE).

1.notes: Free reaction: after an enemy attacks you, deal 1 damage to it. Also provides 3 health of soak.
Fast: spend 1 resource for +1 willpower during a willpower test.

2.notes: Fast: spend 1 resource for +1 combat during a combat test.

1.notes: Investigate your location with its shroud reduced by 2. Spends 1 supply.

1000.notes: Played as an action: discover 1 clue at your location without testing.

01039.notes: Commit to an Investigate test; discover 1 additional clue on success.

1000.notes: Played after you defeat an enemy at your location: discover 1 clue there (combat->clue synergy).

01022.notes: Investigate payoff gated on defeating an enemy; pairs with Roland's combat focus.

01023.notes: Cancel an enemy attack (and its triggered effects).

01089.notes: Flex commit: two willpower icons; draw a card when the test succeeds.

01093.notes: Flex commit: two wild icons, usable on any skill test.

01007.notes: Clue-spend obligation: while in play, clues discovered at its location are placed on Cover Up instead of being collected; suffer mental trauma if it is still in play when eliminated.

01000.notes: Placeholder for a randomly assigned basic weakness.

1.notes: Free: discard Beat Cop to deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.

01018.notes: +1 combat to controller; 2 health / 2 sanity soak; discard to deal 1 damage.

1.notes: Action: spend 1 supply to heal 1 damage or horror from an investigator at your location.

01019.notes: Healer; 3 supplies, heals damage or horror from a colocated investigator (including self).

1000.notes: Played as an action: place 3 ammo on a Firearm asset controlled by an investigator at your location.

1.notes: Free: discard during an investigator's turn at your location to give that investigator 2 additional actions.

01027.notes: +1 willpower; discard for 2 extra actions (action economy).

1.notes: Free: exhaust and deal 1 damage to Beat Cop to deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location (repeatable).

01028.notes: +1 combat; 3 health / 2 sanity soak; repeatable 1 damage by self-damaging.

1.notes: Fight with +3 combat; deals 1 damage per point you succeed by (min 1, max 5). Spends 1 ammo.
Fast: exhaust and take 1 horror to convert 1 of its 4 secrets into a resource.

01058.notes: Resource engine; trades stored secrets (and horror) for resources.

01059.notes: Accessory: +1 willpower passive plus 2 sanity of horror soak.

1.notes: Spend 1 charge: Fight using willpower instead of combat; risks 1 horror on skull/cultist/tablet/elder_thing/auto_fail.

01060.notes: Core mystic attack spell; willpower-based fighting with 4 charges.

1.notes: Exhaust + 1 charge: look at top 3 of any deck (including the encounter deck) and reorder them.

01061.notes: Deck-manipulation utility; sets up draws and dodges incoming encounter cards.

1.notes: Fast: spend 1 resource for +1 willpower this skill test.

2.notes: Fast: spend 1 resource for +1 intellect this skill test.

01062.notes: Pay-to-boost willpower or intellect on demand.

2.notes: Fast, exhaust: search top 3 of your deck for a Spell and draw it (tutor).

01063.notes: Spell tutor ally; enters with 1 doom (drawback). 1 health / 2 sanity soak.

1000.notes: Played as an action: draw the top encounter card, then discover 2 clues at your location.

01064.notes: High clue burst with an encounter-draw drawback.

01065.notes: Fast: cancel a non-weakness treachery's revelation effect; take 1 horror.

1000.notes: Evade using willpower instead of agility; deal 1 damage on success; lose an action on bad tokens.

01066.notes: Willpower-based evade spell that also deals 1 damage.

01067.notes: Commit (willpower icon); heal 1 horror if the test succeeds.

01068.notes: Fast, after a phase begins: blank a non-Elite enemy's text box until end of phase (disables Retaliate/forced effects).

1.notes: Exhaust + 1 resource: add 1 charge to a Spell asset you control (refuel).

01070.notes: Grants +1 arcane slot and refuels spell charges (spell economy).

1.notes: Reaction, spend 1 charge: reveal 2 chaos tokens and resolve only the better one.

01071.notes: Chaos-bag control; mitigates bad tokens on any of your tests. 4 charges.

01008.notes: Daisy's signature: grants 2 extra hand slots usable only for Tome assets; deckbuilding enabler.

1.notes: Move 1 horror from The Necronomicon to Daisy; discard it once it has no horror left.

01009.notes: Daisy's signature weakness Tome: enters with 3 horror, can't leave while it has horror, treats elder signs as auto-fails until removed.

01010.notes: Skids' signature; Fast after your turn begins: non-Elite enemies cannot attack you until end of round.

01012.notes: Agnes' signature; reaction draws 1 card each time you play a Spell card (card-draw engine).

01013.notes: Agnes' signature weakness Spell: placing doom can advance the agenda; Forced 2 horror if still in hand at end of your turn.

01014.notes: Wendy's signature; play the topmost event from your discard as if in hand and recycle played/discarded events to the bottom of your deck.

01090.notes: Two intellect icons; draw a card when the test succeeds.

01092.notes: Two agility icons; draw a card when the test succeeds.

01094.notes: Body armor; soaks 4 health of damage.

1.notes: Fight; deals +1 damage (2 total) if you succeed by 2 or more.

01044.notes: Cheap fast Melee weapon that rewards a high agility roll with extra damage.

1.notes: Exhaust: Investigate; on success gain 3 resources instead of discovering clues (resource engine).

01045.notes: Talent that converts a successful investigation into 3 resources.

1.notes: Reaction: after you evade an enemy, exhaust to draw 1 card.

01046.notes: Card-draw engine that rewards evading enemies.

1.notes: Spend 1 ammo: Fight with +2 combat; deals +1 damage (2 total) if you succeed by 2 or more.

01047.notes: Illicit firearm with 3 ammo; the primary rogue gun.

01048.notes: Grants an additional action each turn (action economy/tempo); also 2 health / 2 sanity soak.

1.notes: Fast: spend 1 resource for +1 combat during this skill test.

2.notes: Fast: spend 1 resource for +1 agility during this skill test.

01050.notes: Fast: disengage from all enemies and move to a connecting location with no enemies (escape).

1000.notes: Played as an action: Fight using agility instead of combat; this attack deals +2 damage (3 total).
Played as an action: deal 2 damage to an exhausted enemy at your location (no test).

01052.notes: Untested 2 damage against an exhausted enemy; pairs with evade.

01053.notes: Flex commit: one wild icon; returns to hand instead of discarding if you succeed by 3 or more (recurring).

1.notes: Action: disengage from all enemies and move to a connecting location without provoking attacks of opportunity.

01055.notes: +1 agility; escape/reposition ally with 2 health / 2 sanity soak.

01056.notes: Fast: after revealing a chaos token with a negative modifier, switch its '-' to '+' (negates a bad token).

01030.notes: Fast Item.Tool: passive +1 intellect while investigating. Cheap reliable seeker clue tool.

1.notes: Action, exhaust: an investigator at your location searches top 3 of deck for a card and draws it (card selection/tutor).

01031.notes: Tome card-advantage engine; can fuel another player's draw at your location.

1.notes: Reaction when it enters play: search your deck for a Tome asset and add it to hand (tutor).

01032.notes: Miskatonic ally that tutors a Tome (e.g. Old Book of Lore); 1/1 of soak as a body.

1.notes: Reaction after you successfully investigate, exhaust: gain 1 resource (economy engine).

01033.notes: Premium seeker ally: passive +1 intellect plus a resource on every successful investigate.

1.notes: Fast, spend 1 resource: +1 intellect for this skill test.

2.notes: Fast, spend 1 resource: +1 agility for this skill test.

01034.notes: Talent that converts resources into intellect or agility on demand.

1.notes: Action: test intellect (2) on an investigator at your location; success heals 1 damage, failure deals 1 damage.

01035.notes: Risky Tome heal that can backfire on a failed intellect test.

01036.notes: Fast Insight: until end of round use intellect in place of combat and agility (lets a seeker fight/evade off intellect).

1000.notes: Played as an action: attach to your location; non-Elite enemies cannot move into it until an investigator leaves.

01038.notes: Defensive attachment that walls off your location from non-Elite enemy movement.

1.notes: Reaction when a non-Elite enemy spawns at your location, discard: discard/evade or deal 2 damage to that enemy (panic-button removal).

01041.notes: One-shot Relic that neutralizes a freshly spawned non-Elite threat.

1.notes: Action, exhaust + 1 secret: give an investigator at your location +2 to a chosen skill until end of phase.

01042.notes: Tome that buffs any investigator's chosen skill for a phase (limited secrets).

1000.notes: Fast Insight played for effect: an investigator at your location draws 3 cards (strong card advantage).

01043.notes: Big card-draw burst for yourself or a colocated ally.

01072.notes: Body armor; soaks 2 damage. Also gives a combat icon when committed.

1.notes: Reaction after you investigate successfully by 2+: return an Item card from your discard to your hand.

01073.notes: Recurs Item cards (weapons/tools) from the discard pile.

1.notes: Fight with +2 combat and +1 damage; discard if a skull or auto-fail is revealed during the attack.
Reaction after you fail a skill test: draw 1 card.

01075.notes: Card-draw engine that turns failed tests into draws.

1.notes: Free: discard Stray Cat to automatically evade a non-Elite enemy at your location.
Fast: spend 1 resource for +1 willpower this test.

2.notes: Fast: spend 1 resource for +1 agility this test.

1000.notes: Played as an Evade action: automatically evade all enemies at your location.

01078.notes: Mass auto-evade to disengage from a swarm.

01079.notes: Fast after failing an investigate by 2 or less: discover 2 clues at your location (turns a miss into clues).

01080.notes: Fast when you would fail a skill test: +2 to your skill value for that test.

01081.notes: Agility skill icon; on a successful evade, disengage from all other enemies and move to a connecting location.

1.notes: Reaction when an enemy attacks you: exhaust and take 1 horror to redirect that enemy's damage to another enemy at your location (you still take horror).

01082.notes: Key survivor ally; redirects attack damage onto another enemy.

01083.notes: Fast after a non-weakness, non-Elite enemy at your location is evaded: shuffle it into the encounter deck (removes it).

01085.notes: Fast during your turn: until end of turn do not reveal chaos tokens for any tests you perform (wards all tokens).

01105.note: What's Going On?! - lead takes 2 horror or all discard a card.

01106.note: Rise of the Ghouls - draws a Ghoul enemy from the encounter deck.

01107.note: They're Getting Out! - doom accelerates with ghouls in Parlor/Hallway; advancing ends the scenario.

objective.note: Uncovering the Conspiracy - no clue advance cost. As an action, spend 2 clues per player (from anywhere) to draw and resolve a card from the Cultist deck (find/fight a Cultist). Advances when there are 6 unique Cultist cards in the victory display, so investigate to fund the hunt and combat to bank the cultists.

01121a.note: Predator or Prey? - on advance, spawn The Masked Hunter engaged with the prey investigator, then advance to agenda 2.

01122.note: Time Is Running Short - on advance, the scenario ends at Resolution 2 (It Is Past Midnight); the cult has had too much time.

objective.note: Into the Darkness - advances when any investigator enters the Ritual Site (placed when act 1 advances). The objective is to reach/descend into the Ritual Site; on advance an enemy is dug out of the encounter deck and spawned there.

Disrupting the Ritual - as an action, pay 1 clue and pass a willpower or agility (3) test to place 1 clue on the act. Advances when there are at least 2 clues per player on the act. Defeating Umordhoth instead wins via Vengeance Awaits (Resolution 2).

01143.note: The Arkham Woods - on advance, dig a Monster enemy out of the encounter deck and spawn it at Main Path with 1 doom, then advance to agenda 2.

01144.note: The Ritual Begins - while in play all enemies get +1 fight and +1 evade. On advance, each investigator tests willpower (6) or gains a random Madness basic weakness, then advance to agenda 3.

01145.note: Vengeance Awaits - forced ability brings Umordhoth into play at the Ritual Site; defeating Umordhoth wins (Resolution 2). If this agenda reaches its doom threshold (side B), the acts are discarded and the investigators lose (No Resolution).
